title: Smoky Roasted Indian Tofu Curry
description: A quick, citrusy and creamy curry that brings together smoky roasted tofu, aromatic spices, and coconut cream for a satisfying plantbased meal.
ingredients: {"name":"1 small onion, 2 garlic cloves, 1 tbsp grated ginger","amount":"1 small onion, 2 garlic cloves, 1 tbsp"}
{"name":"1 tsp Indian spice mix (smoked paprika, cumin, coriander)","amount":"1 tsp"}
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F). Press tofu between paper towels to remove excess moisture.
Cut tofu into 1‑inch cubes and pat dry with paper towels.
Toss tofu cubes with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes, flipping halfway through, until golden.
Heat remaining 1 tbsp oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger; sauté for 3‑4 minutes until fragrant.
Stir in bell pepper, cherry tomatoes, spice mix, turmeric, cayenne, and tomato paste; cook for 2 minutes.
Pour in coconut milk and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat, add roasted tofu, and pour in lime juice. Simmer for 5‑7 minutes, allowing flavors to meld.
Season with additional salt and pepper to taste. Garnish with fresh cilantro if desired.
Serve over basmati rice or with warm naan for a complete meal.
